title: Show HN: Ant – A JavaScript runtime and ecosystem
summary: Ant是一个包含自研JavaScript引擎、包管理器、部署平台和桌面应用框架的完整JavaScript生态系统。
translated_summary: Ant is a JavaScript ecosystem built around a runtime with its own engine, including a package manager, deployment platform, and desktop app framework, aiming to provide a coherent end-to-end alternative to existing stacks.
